{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Scales of the Weeping Dragon
| introduced = Waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Scales of the Weeping Dragon]] is an armor that crackles with lightning.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c36">''Waybound'', chapter 36</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
